title: Should-be rejected conversions unexpectedly execute successfully in the join and cause bugs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(c0 VARCHAR(255), c1 INT);
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE c1 = 1 AND 1=1;
CREATE TABLE t4(c0 FLOAT, c1 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t4(c0, c1) VALUES (1.5, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t4 WHERE c1 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: WHERE clause evaluates string as true in joins
